priority_critical.issue: Collision rate and 'true absorption rate' are the same metric (Jaccard overlap), making the correlation validation circular
priority_critical.action: Reframe collision rate validation as 'reliability of operational definition' rather than 'proxy validation'. Distinguish between Chanin et al.'s conceptual definition (probe-based) and the paper's operational definition (top-K overlap). Add explicit discussion of this circularity.

priority_critical.issue: Only 7 ground truth pairs for UAD evaluation; F1 estimate has huge variance
priority_critical.action: Add bootstrap confidence intervals for F1/precision/recall. Acknowledge the small sample size explicitly in the abstract, introduction, and limitations. Frame conclusions as 'UAD fails on this test set' rather than universal claims.

priority_critical.issue: F1 = 0.00048 vs same-cluster random F1 = 0.00048 is a mathematical identity (same TP/FP/FN), presented as empirical finding
priority_critical.action: Reframe: 'UAD detects exactly 1 true positive out of 4,155 candidates. Randomly sampling 4,155 pairs from the same cluster structure yields the same 1 true positive by chance. UAD's sophisticated pipeline provides zero improvement over this trivial baseline.'

priority_major.issue: Token-level mutual exclusivity claimed as universal property, but only demonstrated on one synthetic number sequence
priority_major.action: Soften universal claims. State that mutual exclusivity holds for tested token-disjoint hierarchies (numbers, punctuation). Acknowledge that semantic hierarchies (animal/dog) may show different patterns. Add semantic hierarchy test if time permits.

priority_major.issue: K-means achieves 85.7% recall but is dismissed without analyzing why it outperforms other variants
priority_major.action: Add analysis of K-means cluster assignments for GT features. Investigate what property K-means uses to group absorption features. Discuss whether a post-hoc threshold could improve precision.

priority_major.issue: Novelty check performed on original positive-result framing, not current negative-result paper
priority_major.action: Re-assess novelty for actual contributions: (1) first systematic evaluation of co-occurrence clustering for absorption, (2) token-level mutual exclusivity insight, (3) collision rate validation at scale. Search for prior work on these specific contributions.

priority_major.issue: Only one SAE (gpt2-small-res-jb, layer 8) tested; architecture-independence claim is unsupported
priority_major.action: Add at least one additional test (different layer or SAE architecture) OR explicitly state this as a major limitation and downgrade architecture-independence from assertion to hypothesis.

priority_major.issue: Abstract claims 'establishes a dead-end direction' and Conclusion calls to 'abandon co-occurrence-based approaches' --- stronger than evidence supports
priority_major.action: Soften impact claims. Replace 'dead-end direction' with 'this specific approach.' Replace 'abandon' with 'exercise caution' or 'consider alternatives.' Add scope restriction to token-disjoint hierarchies.

priority_minor.issue: 'Collision rate' introduced in abstract without definition
priority_minor.action: Add parenthetical definition in abstract: 'collision rate (Jaccard overlap of top-K activating features).'

priority_minor.issue: Missing recent related work (CE-Bench, FMS, Jiang et al. 2025)
priority_minor.action: Add CE-Bench and FMS to Related Work with clear differentiation from UAD. Cite Jiang et al. for co-occurrence analysis precedent.

priority_minor.issue: Ablation filters (dead feature, phi) appear to be no-ops; identical TP/FP/FN across variants
priority_minor.action: Report how many features were actually removed by each filtering step. If zero, explain why.
Run UAD with 2-3 additional seeds and report variance in F1. Quick check for robustness.

priority_minor.issue: False positive rate terminology non-standard (uses 1-precision instead of FP/(FP+TN))
priority_minor.action: Replace 'false positive rate = 99.98%' with 'precision = 0.024%'. Use standard ML terminology.

priority_minor.issue: Combined collision correlation (r=0.869) inflated by between-hierarchy variance
priority_minor.action: Acknowledge this statistical artifact. Report individual hierarchy correlations prominently alongside combined correlation.

priority_minor.issue: No code repository link; custom UAD implementation not described in detail
priority_minor.action: Add reproducibility statement with code link (even placeholder). Add pseudocode for UAD pipeline in Methods.

priority_minor.issue: Conclusion missing memorable restatement of core insight
priority_minor.action: Add crisp summary: 'Co-occurrence clustering asks which features fire together. Absorption requires answering which features represent the same concept at different granularities. These are different questions, and UAD conflates them.'
